---
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    css: ["default", "extra.css"]
    lib_dir: libs
    seal: false
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
      ratio: '16:9'
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
##xaringan::inf_mr()
## For offline work: https://bookdown.org/yihui/rmarkdown/some-tips.html#working-offline
## Images not appearing? Put images folder inside the libs folder as that is the main data directory

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(stargazer)
##library(kableExtra)
##library(modelr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      eval = TRUE,
                      error = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      comment = NA)
```

class: slideblue

.size70[**Today's Agenda**]

<br>

.size50[
.center[
The Political Violence Case Study

(due Feb 20)
]]

<br>

.center[.size40[
  Justin Leinaweaver (Spring 2022)
]]

???

### Prep for Class
1. ...

<br>



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-light_grey.jpg')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle

.size50[**Political Violence Case Study**]

.size35[(due Feb 20)

Use all of the data sources from last week to write a report on **one country** that:

- **Summarizes AND analyzes** its recent history of political violence (e.g. over the last ten years), and 

- **Makes an argument** about what the current CIRIGHTS codings should be based on the 2020 Country Reports on Human Rights Practices from the State Department
]

???

ANY QUESTIONS ON THE ASSIGNMENT?



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-light_grey.jpg')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle

.size35[
Use all of the data sources from last week to write a report on **one country** that:

- **Summarizes AND analyzes** its recent history of political violence (e.g. over the last ten years), and 

- **Makes an argument** about what the current CIRIGHTS codings should be based on the 2020 Country Reports on Human Rights Practices from the State Department

**For Today**: Come to class with 3-5 key conclusions about your country's experience of political violence based on your analyses
]

???

DOES EVERYBODY HAVE THEIR 3-5 KEY CONCLUSIONS READY?

These represent the premises in your argument!

<br>

Ok, break out into groups of three (new people!) and share your conclusions.

Get feedback on your conclusions, reflect on the the feedback and revise!



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-swirls.jpg')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle, center

.size70[**For Friday**]

.size40[

For each of the conclusions you have identified, find a news story you can use to illustrate it.

This should supplement your evidence from our sources last week.

Be ready to present each conclusion and its current events evidence.

]

???

Each of the key conclusions in your report (including your argument about coding the 2020 CIRIGHTS variables) requires evidence.

Your main evidence comes from our sources last week, but will be FAR stronger with supplementary examples.

For each conclusion find a news story or other piece of external evidence to illustrate your argument.
